status: exact finite realized-word x-parallel occupancy, birth, and L7-to-L8 decomposition smoke probe; the full literal occupancy state is singleton on this horizon, not stabilized; not a universal Post quotient, availability bound, or unconditional theorem

canonical_run.command: env OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1 OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 MKL_NUM_THREADS=1 VECLIB_MAXIMUM_THREADS=1 NUMEXPR_NUM_THREADS=1 nice -n 15 python3 -B design/x_axis_occupancy_birth_probe.py run --output /tmp/x-axis-occupancy-birth-probe-canonical.json

independent_repeat.normalization: parse JSON, remove resource_policy.elapsed_seconds, serialize with sorted keys and separators (comma, colon)

finite_scope.left_to_right_semantics: counterfactual replay of the same pinned selected words with gap rank equal to path order; not a constructed alternate path or universal policy
finite_scope.covered_channel: prefix occupancy and births of x-parallel secants, with exact selected-point collision assertions

cegar_result.ladder: ancestry depth 0..2, causal path-window radius 0..3, with active-line-only diagnostic, full occupancies, and full occupancies plus anchor/insertion provenance

full_occupancy_at_depth_0_radius_0.interpretation: the exact singleton-plus-active occupancy already makes every tested L7 schedule state unique, so deeper CEGAR refinements cannot test repeated-state transition stabilization

active_line_only_at_depth_0_radius_0.interpretation: dropping singleton occupancy is concretely noncongruent even after conditioning on the recorded action

active_line_only_with_radius_1.interpretation: one causal path neighbor separates the sample completely; this is state explosion, not finite closure evidence

proved_by_finite_computation: all 564 target cursor occupancies are exact for the pinned recorded words and named schedules
every selected word passes the sequential x-channel legality assertions and every reported birth is an exact occupancy transition from one to two
all 438 target decompositions are exact and the inherited source-prefix component obeys the exact B transport
the active-line-only projection has two exact finite noncongruent state/action classes
referee_interpretation.finite_obstruction: The full literal x occupancy is finite but does not compress on this horizon: all 126 source schedule states are singletons. The left-to-right schedule reduces late-parent completion but does not create a repeated full occupancy state in this sample.
not_proved: that no coarser monotone or symbolic occupancy quotient can stabilize
transition congruence for alternate legal connector choices or L9 and later
a Markov update across arbitrary same-level corridor recenterings
control of non-x secants, endpoint-on-candidate-line defects, or combined poison availability
a safety greatest fixed point or unconditional theorem
